## Outcome

<!-- Observable user or operator result. -->

## Contracts and boundaries

- [ ] Organization scope and authorization are explicit
- [ ] State, idempotency, retry, cancellation, and cleanup are explicit
- [ ] Public/internal contracts and generated artifacts are updated

## Verification

- [ ] Focused behavior tests
- [ ] Cross-tenant/security negative tests
- [ ] Affected contract, type, lint, and security checks
- [ ] Rollout and rollback evidence

## Security

- [ ] No secret, production data, broad privilege, or mutable artifact added
- [ ] Dependency and license impact reviewed
